lint.details: No dedicated lint script configured per project conventions

nonBlockingIssues.description: Delete handler in App.tsx silently ignores failures (result.type === 'failure'). Error handling should be surfaced to user (e.g., stderr log or Footer note).
The 'blocked' return state after session cancellation has no automatic retry mechanism - caller must manually retry.
When worktree path doesn't exist on disk, function returns success without checking if git worktree entry still exists.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Document the Result pattern convention (success/failure discriminated unions) as the standard approach for operation results across the codebase. This is consistently used in worktree services.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: All three lifecycle features use Result types (ArchiveWorktreeResult, DeleteWorktreeResult) with discriminated unions. The pattern is well-established but not explicitly documented in AGENTS.md.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add explicit guidance on error surfacing in UI layer. Currently some errors are silently ignored (e.g., delete failures in App.tsx) with TODO comments. Recommend standard pattern for surfacing service failures to users.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Review found delete handler silently ignores failures with comment 'could show toast in future'. This pattern may repeat across features without explicit guidance.

rejectedObservations.observation: Library documentation should be updated with archive/delete/restart reconciliation patterns
rejectedObservations.details: The workers already comprehensively updated .factory/library/worktree-domain.md and .factory/library/restart-reconciliation.md during implementation. No additional updates needed.

rejectedObservations.observation: Footer should show delete/archive shortcuts dynamically based on selection
rejectedObservations.details: This behavior is already implemented and tested in Footer.tsx. The review confirmed it works correctly.

synthesisNotes.testCoverage: 191 tests passing across all features. Archive: 7 tests. Delete: 8 tests. Selection repair: 5 tests. Restart reconciliation: 8 tests.
synthesisNotes.architectureCompliance: All features properly separate concerns: worktree lifecycle in GitWorktreeService, React state in hooks/store, presentation in components. No business logic leaked into view layer.
synthesisNotes.keyboardUx: All lifecycle actions (Ctrl+A Archive, Ctrl+D Delete) properly integrated with keyboard-first UX and Footer shortcuts.
synthesisNotes.persistence: All state changes properly persisted via WorktreeRepository.updateWorktree() for durability across restarts.
fulfilledAssertions: VAL-LIFECYCLE-001: Archive preserves worktree, removes from active navigation
VAL-LIFECYCLE-002: Delete removes git worktree and clears from UI state
VAL-LIFECYCLE-003: Failed delete surfaces cleanup_failed state
VAL-LIFECYCLE-004: Restart reconciliation surfaces missing worktrees without recreation
VAL-LIFECYCLE-005: Delete cleans up active sessions first
VAL-LIFECYCLE-006: Interrupted sessions become recovered non-active state
VAL-CROSS-003: Restart preserves valid current work only
VAL-CROSS-004: Restart restores valid selection or safe empty state
